pr_title: [GPU] Support CPU pointers on remote tensor

failed_jobs.name: Pytorch Layer Tests / PyTorch Layer Tests

root_cause_summary: The actions/upload-artifact step for test-results-python-pytorch-layers completed validation (1 file found, name valid, root dir valid) but then terminated silently in under 1 second without uploading the file. No error message was logged. The artifact is absent from the run artifacts list. Pytest itself completed successfully with 16281 passed, 4 xpassed tests.
notable_findings: 4 xpassed tests in pytorch_tests (test_arange, test_einsum) - tests previously expected to fail now pass, which may indicate improvements from recent commits
Artifact test-results-python-pytorch-layers is missing from the run's artifacts list confirming upload failure
The upload action terminated after ~240ms which is consistent with a silent abort (not a timeout)
recommended_actions: Re-run the failed job (Pytorch Layer Tests) as the failure appears to be an infrastructure flake
Investigate if the 4 xpassed tests (test_arange, test_einsum) need their xfail markers removed
Monitor GitHub Actions service status at https://www.githubstatus.com/
